Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.Analyzer

Packages that use Analyzer
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.analysis.plot
Basic 2D plotting support.

  • Uses of Analyzer in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework that return Analyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.add(String name, NondominatedPopulation approximationSet)
    Adds a new sample with the specified name.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.addAll(String name, Collection<NondominatedPopulation> approximationSets)
    Adds the collection of new samples with the specified name.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.clear()
    Clears all data stored in this analyzer.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeAdditiveEpsilonIndicator()
    Enables the evaluation of the additive ε-indicator metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeAllMetrics()
    Enables the evaluation of all metrics.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeContribution()
    Enables the evaluation of the contribution metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeGenerationalDistance()
    Enables the evaluation of the generational distance metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeGenerationalDistancePlus()
    Enables the evaluation of the generational distance plus metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeHypervolume()
    Enables the evaluation of the hypervolume metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeInvertedGenerationalDistance()
    Enables the evaluation of the inverted generational distance metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeInvertedGenerationalDistancePlus()
    Enables the evaluation of the inverted generational distance plus metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeMaximumParetoFrontError()
    Enables the evaluation of the maximum Pareto front error metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeR1()
    Enables the evaluation of the R1 indicator.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeR2()
    Enables the evaluation of the R2 indicator.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeR3()
    Enables the evaluation of the R3 indicator.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.includeSpacing()
    Enables the evaluation of the spacing metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.loadAs(String name, File resultFile)
    Loads the samples stored in a result file using ResultFileReader.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.loadData(File directory, String prefix, String suffix)
    Loads data into this analyzer, which was previously saved using saveData(File, String, String) with matching arguments.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.printAnalysis()
    Prints the analysis of all data recorded in this analyzer to standard output.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.printAnalysis(PrintStream ps)
    Prints the analysis of all data recorded in this analyzer.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.saveAnalysis(File file)
    Saves the analysis of all data recorded in this analyzer to the specified file.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.saveAs(String name, File resultFile)
    Saves the samples to a result file using ResultFileWriter.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.saveData(File directory, String prefix, String suffix)
    Saves all data stored in this analyzer, which can subsequently be read using loadData(File, String, String) with matching arguments.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.saveReferenceSet(File file)
    Saves the reference set to the specified file.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.showAggregate()
    Enables the output of the metric value of the aggregate approximation set, produced by merging all individual seeds.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.showAll()
    Enables the output of all analysis results.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.showIndividualValues()
    Enables the output of individual metric values for each seed.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.showStatistic(org.apache.commons.math3.stat.descriptive.UnivariateStatistic statistic)
    Specifies the UnivariateStatistics calculated during the analysis.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.showStatisticalSignificance()
    Enables the output of statistical significance tests.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.usingProblemFactory(ProblemFactory problemFactory)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withEpsilon(double... epsilon)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withEpsilons(Epsilons epsilons)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withIdealPoint(double... idealPoint)
    Sets the ideal point used for computing the hypervolume metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withProblem(String problemName)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withProblem(Problem problemInstance)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withProblemClass(Class<?> problemClass, Object... problemArguments)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withProblemClass(String problemClassName, Object... problemArguments)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withReferencePoint(double... referencePoint)
    Sets the reference point used for computing the hypervolume metric.
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withReferenceSet(File referenceSetFile)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withReferenceSet(NondominatedPopulation referenceSet)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withSameProblemAs(org.moeaframework.ProblemBuilder builder)
     
    Analyzer
    Analyzer.withSignifianceLevel(double significanceLevel)
    Sets the level of significance used when testing the statistical significance of observed differences in the medians.

  • Uses of Analyzer in org.moeaframework.analysis.plot

    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis.plot with parameters of type Analyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Plot
    Plot.add(Analyzer analyzer)
    Displays the statistical results from an Analyzer as a box-and-whisker plot.
